item.title: Musk's DOGE and Trump's Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Musk’s DOGE and Trump’s Tariff Tango

In Musk’s world, transparency’s thin,
As DOGE’s errors are hidden within.
While Trump’s tariff spree,
Leaves allies in plea,
The market’s a chaotic spin.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • DOGE Makes Its Latest Errors Harder to Find
  • Trump’s Big Bet: Americans Will Tolerate Economic Downturn to Restore Manufacturing
  • Stock Market Remains Uncertain Amid Trump’s Whipsawing Tariffs and Budget Cuts

item.title: A Dance of Power and Records
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A Dance of Power and Records

Musk’s team wants the IRS’ file,
To fix waste with cunning and guile.
Trump’s firings are grand,
But then with a hand,
He rehired them all with a smile.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Musk Team Seeks Access to I.R.S. System With Taxpayers’ Records
  • Trump Fired, Then Unfired, National Nuclear Security Administration Employees. What Were Their Jobs?

item.title: When DOGE Met a Legal Wedge
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

When DOGE Met a Legal Wedge

While Musk and Trump made quite a scene,
DOGE access was stopped by the queen.
With budgets on ice,
And aid not so nice,
The courtroom’s become the main screen.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Judge Halts DOGE Access to Treasury Payment Systems
  • Musk Wields Scythe on Federal Work Force, With Trump’s Full Blessing
  • Judge Pauses Elements of Trump Plan to Shut Down U.S.A.I.D.
